comment: FFmpeg pre-built Windows shared DLLs. Pinned for media-win-ffmpeg feature. Mirror is a Cloudflare R2 public bucket (pub-*.r2.dev) — see packaging/windows/README.md for the rotation runbook. Bumped from n6.1.1 → n7.1.4 because BtbN garbage-collected the 2024-01 6.1.1 release and only ships current major branches (7.1 / 8.1) on rotating autobuilds.
